name: omniship-home
description: omniship.dev — the OmniShip Labs collective home page

scripts.build: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist && cp -R src/. dist/ && cp CNAME dist/ && lessc src/styles/site.less dist/styles/site.css && rm dist/styles/site.less
scripts.serve: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 8080 -d dist
